meaning: 卡塔尼亚[意大利西西里岛东岸港市](或译喀大尼亚)
examples: What happened in Catania has nothing to do with football.
I am sorry for friends of Catania but we have to absolutely win.
We have Catania in our sights and we hope to move closer to them.
Leaders Juventus travel to Torino on Sunday while third place AC Milan host Catania.
Catania levelled in the 75th minute when Maxi Lopez converted Jorge Martinez's cross from close range.
